name: Garlic & Cheese Grits
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup (100g) Corn Grits - Yellow or White
1/4 teaspoon Cayenne pepper or Tabasco sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large saucepan, combine water, grits, and salt.
2. Bring to a simmer and cook until the grits are very thick, then remove from heat.
3. Grease an 13-inch x 9-inch baking dish.
4. Stir together grits and remaining ingredients in the saucepan.
5. Pour into prepared dish and spread evenly.
6. Sprinkle top with additional paprika.
7. Bake for 30-35 minutes at 350°F.
Source: Arrowhead Mills "The Natural Way to Start Your Day" tri-fold Reprinted by permission of Arrowhead Mills, Inc. Electronic format courtesy of: Karen Mintzias
